title: Local Input Security, Resource Limits, Privacy, and Diagnostics · Language Clinic: Safe Serialization
summary: Imported mazes allocate from untrusted dimensions, pickle is accepted, paths escape their root, and logs retain player data indefinitely. Predict the model, event, graph, solver, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the safe serialization increment in bounded local-data threat model and controls. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use bounded data-only formats and reject pickle or executable object reconstruction for untrusted saves.
Identify untrusted files, dimensions, strings, paths, package resources, environment state, logs, and denial-of-service consequences.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-worked-maze-security-local-files-3
# Competency: maze-worked-maze-security-local-files-3.
# Case 5798: a clean desktop release rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: the player cannot rely on color or animation.
# Changed case: change the seed and retain replay identity.
def worked_maze_security_local_files_3(admitted_cells: int = 4096, maximum_cells: int = 16384, rejected_documents: int = 7, executable_formats: int = 0, retained_log_days: int = 7) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "gridworked3",
        "topology5798",
        "search3dekrow",
        "eventworked35798",
        "access5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if admitted_cells < 1 or maximum_cells < 1:
        return False, admitted_cells, "resource-shape"
    if admitted_cells > maximum_cells:
        return False, admitted_cells, "cell-budget"
    if rejected_documents < 1:
        return False, rejected_documents, "rejection-evidence"
    if executable_formats > 0 or retained_log_days > 30:
        return False, executable_formats, "local-trust"
    assert admitted_cells <= maximum_cells
    return True, admitted_cells, "bounded-local-data"

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-safe-serialization-be4p1u
# Competency: maze-safe-serialization.
# Case 7966: a museum kiosk accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: resource use must remain below an explicit budget.
# Changed case: change display scale and retain focus and control access.
def evidence_maze_safe_serialization_be4p1u(admitted_cells: int = 4096, maximum_cells: int = 16384, rejected_documents: int = 7, executable_formats: int = 0, retained_log_days: int = 7) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_be4p1u = "be4p1u-u1p4eb-7966"
    assert evidence_variant_be4p1u
    evidence_axes_be4p1u = (
        "gridbe4p1u",
        "topology7966",
        "searchu1p4eb",
        "eventbe4p1u7966",
        "access7966be4p1u",
        "recoveryu1p4eb7966",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_be4p1u)) == 6
    if admitted_cells < 1 or maximum_cells < 1:
        return False, admitted_cells, "resource-shape"
    if admitted_cells > maximum_cells:
        return False, admitted_cells, "cell-budget"
    if rejected_documents < 1:
        return False, rejected_documents, "rejection-evidence"
    if executable_formats > 0 or retained_log_days > 30:
        return False, executable_formats, "local-trust"
    assert admitted_cells <= maximum_cells
    return True, admitted_cells, "bounded-local-data"

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Safe Serialization model · Theory Safe Serialization, keep Safe Serialization connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use bounded data-only formats and reject pickle or executable object reconstruction for untrusted saves.

hints: For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Safe Serialization model · Theory Safe Serialization, name the player, revision, Python, Tcl and Tk versions, grid, coordinate, seed, topology, frontier, path, event, state, render, accessibility, package, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Safe Serialization precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Safe Serialization model · Theory Safe Serialization, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A theory puzzle team handles case 2683 during a keyboard-only puzzle tournament. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound local inputs, reject executable serialization, constrain resources, and minimize diagnostics; all graph claims need an independent witness; then change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Use bounded data-only formats and reject pickle or executable object reconstruction for untrusted saves.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Safe Serialization model · Theory Safe Serialization, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: A local pickle is safe because the learner created the file.

checks.description: The cumulative python portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker # Evidence: maze-safe-serialization-be4p1u.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: maze-safe-serialization-be4p1u(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_maze_safe_serialization_be4p1u\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?admitted_cells < 1 or maximum_cells < 1)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?admitted_cells > maximum_cells)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?rejected_documents < 1)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?executable_formats > 0 or retained_log_days > 30)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
